subject: fix(debug): log container fills panel, clipboard textarea fallback
body:
Two fixes from pattern compliance audit:

- Log container: Replace fixed max-height: 360px with height: 100%
  so the log area fills the full available panel space (~414px instead
  of 360px). The env and pwa tabs already filled correctly via the
  parent's overflow; only the log tab had this inconsistency.

- Clipboard fallback: When all three clipboard methods fail (common
  in mobile PWA webviews), show the debug report in a visible readonly
  textarea with onFocus auto-select so users can manually copy. Per
  pattern: "show the report in a <textarea> with onFocus auto-select."
  Includes a Dismiss button to close the fallback.

Tags: debug, clipboard, layout
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: debug-system
Semver: patch
